title: genista ovata subsp. nervata
intro: Genista ovata subsp. nervata is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is commonly found in the Mediterranean region. It is also known as the Spiny broom or Nerve Genista, which is a shrub-like plant with a woody stem and thorny branches. The medicinal properties of Genista ovata subsp. nervata include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, which is attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat kidney stones, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture.
